creator: yokota@zodiac.mech.utsunomiya-u.ac.jp
text:
Hi.

You both reported that the screen flickers/wavers badly when
running FreeBSD 2.2-ALPHA back in December last year.

Numerous improvements have been made in the console driver since
then. If you have a chance to try the latest version of FreeBSD, 
2.2.5-RELEASE, please report if you still see the same problem.

Thank you.

Kazu
